corrections.current: 19κατέβητές δὲ μετʼ εἰρήνης ἐν πάσῃ πρεπού-
corrections.correct: 19κατέβησαν δὲ μετʼ εἰρήνης ἐν πάσῃ πρεπού-
corrections.note: Printed text reads κατέβησαν, not κατέβητές.
The page clearly reads εἰς καὶ, not ὡς καὶ.

corrections.current: V 16 om εν A? (hab ut vid ante ενοις (sic) A*)
corrections.correct: V 16 om εν A? (hab ut vid ante ενοις (sic) Aᶜ)
corrections.note: The siglum after the parenthesis is A with superscript c, not A*.
The witness mark is superscript a.
The printed apparatus has a comma after σωτηριον, not a closing bracket plus V.
The siglum is A with superscript c, not A*.

notes: Body line numbers 17–23 are correctly present as marginal/page-line indicators in the transcription and not treated as verse text. Apparatus otherwise matches, including Subscr Μακκαβαιων γ′ AV.
